## Problem
<!-- What can't be done today, or is awkward, with the current publisher? -->

## Proposed shape
<!-- High-level: new event type? new config option? new install path? -->

## HookBus contract impact
- Does this require a new event type in HOOKBUS_SPEC.md / AgentHook spec?
- Does this change the publisher's published event shape?
- Backwards-compatible? If no, deprecation plan?

## Alternatives considered
<!-- What did you rule out, and why? -->
